mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_on DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT n.id, n.content, n.created_on, n.status, n.link, n.project_id, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date FROM notifications n JOIN project p ON n.project_id = p.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.id DESC
